wordplay_note: She conceals her true role as a federal agent throughout
card_description: Donna Hawthorne (meaning "Hawthorne = Nathaniel Hawthorne (sin and concealment)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Scanner Darkly*. Drug dealer and Arctor's love interest who is secretly a federal agent manipulating him. Name note: She conceals her true role as a federal agent throughout. Love as betrayal — the woman who delivers him to the rehabilitation-as-punishment system. First appears in *A Scanner Darkly*.

reference.brief: Drug dealer and Arctor's love interest who is secretly a federal agent manipulating him
reference.significance: Love as betrayal — the woman who delivers him to the rehabilitation-as-punishment system
